## Summary

Describe the scoped change and the Open RAN portability problem it addresses.

## Evidence impact

- [ ] No claim-bearing output changes.
- [ ] Claim-bearing outputs were regenerated and the changed values are explained.
- [ ] Manuscript tables, figures, and text remain synchronized.

## Validation

- [ ] `make test`
- [ ] `make smoke`
- [ ] Full protocol in `REPRODUCIBILITY.md` when applicable
- [ ] No raw ColO-RAN traces or operator data are included

## Scope and security

- [ ] The change preserves fail-closed behavior.
- [ ] The change stays within `SCOPE_LOCK.md`, or the scope change is explicit.
